sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
Brow Grow – Advanced Brow Enhancing Serum

Unlock fuller, bolder, naturally shapely brows with Brow Grow, a science-backed formula inspired by cutting-edge peptide technology and nature’s most nurturing botanicals. Designed for sparse, thinning, or light brows, this powerful serum works at the follicle level to support thicker-looking growth, strengthen hair roots, and enhance definition—without any irritation or heaviness.

Every swipe delivers a potent blend of Peptides, Glycerine, Plant Extracts, and Hyaluronic Acid—a combination carefully crafted to nourish, fortify, and visibly transform your brows with consistent use. Whether you’ve over-plucked, have naturally light brows, or simply want a more sculpted look, Brow Grow brings your best brows forward.

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
✹Strengthens hair follicles.

✹Maintains moisture for eyebrows.

✹May contribute to a shiny appearance.

✹Enhances the overall condition.

sections.heading: Hero Ingredients
sections.text: Biotinoyl Tetrapeptide-1 (and) Oleanolic Acid (and) Apigenin, Acetyl Tetrapeptide-3 (and) Water (and) Glycerine, Curcuma Longa (Turmeric) Root Extract (and) Water (Aqua) (and) Pentylene Glycol (and) Phytic Acid Hyaluronic Acid

sections.heading: Product Benefits
sections.text:
*Helps increase brow density and reduces thinning

*Strengthens weak or brittle brow roots

*Nourishes and conditions for naturally fuller-looking arches

*Hydrates brow hair and skin without greasiness

*Supports healthier, faster brow regrowth

*Lightweight, non-sticky & easy to use daily
